{{Quote|Sadly, Atraken will never be rebuilt. But the lives of those families torn apart by the brutality of war can still be salvaged.|[[Kaysil Verwood]]|<ref name="Insider 67 HN" />}}
The '''Battle of Atraken''', also known as the '''disaster of Atraken'''<ref name="PotG" /> and the '''Atraken campaign''',<ref name="TNEC" /> was one of the longest battles of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It resulted in the devastation of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], rendering it uninhabitable.

==Background==
[[Atraken/Legends|Atraken]], once a rich source of [[Doonium/Legends|doonium]], became a battleground when [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] protectionist forces refused to relinquish control of the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operation there. Entrenched in the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] crust for nearly a [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the Separatists unleashed [[Bioweapon/Legends|biochemical agents]] to deter the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]]. This resulted in hundreds of thousands of civilian casualties as the toxins seeped into much of the planet's water tables and ecosystems.<ref name="Insider 67 HN" />

==The battle==
As one of the early fronts of the conflict, Atraken was plagued by warfare for almost a year. For the most part, the two opposing forces were locked in a stalemate. Its distant location from the [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]] hampered Republic resupply efforts, but the push of [[Operation Katabatic]] led to the conquering of the Separatists' [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Army/Legends|armies]].<ref name="Insider 67 HN" />

Despite the success of Operation Katabatic spelling victory for the Republic's forces and denying the Separatists access to the valuable shipbuilding ore, the Battle of Atraken spelled tragedy for the one million [[Atrakenite|inhabitants]] of the colony world. An estimated 90% of the planet's population were either poisoned, displaced, or killed in the fighting. Those who could afford to leave fled to neighboring worlds, while others were believed to have sought refuge on [[Trilos]], the only Atraken [[Moon/Legends|moon]] with a breathable [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]].<ref name="Insider 67 HN" />

The Battle of Atraken also proved to the Republic that it was impossible to wage a "clean" war.<ref name="TNEC" />
